name: Gleamfall
personality: Gleamfall's ° soft eyes and crown make this duck look regal, but the bill delivers commentary sharper than a linter with zero tolerance configured. Asking Gleamfall to wait politely for a meeting to end is a futile exercise; the snark will not be contained.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
